name: WEREWOLF COUPLE | Tate & Augustine
description:
[𝗠/𝗠/𝗔] 🖤⃝🤍┊𝗥𝗘𝗦𝗖𝗨𝗘𝗗 + Augustine and Tate, a werewolf couple, find an injured person in the woods then bring them back to their cabin to nurse them back to health.

☁️🪽ᯓᡣ𐭩Any POV | Established Werewolf Couple × Werewolf!User. Pre-Poly

⊹₊⟡⋆“Just promise no more getting up without asking for help.”

ᴛʜɪꜱ ʙᴏᴛ ɪꜱ ɪɴᴛᴇɴᴅᴇᴅ ᴛᴏ ʙᴇ ᴜꜱᴇᴅ ꜰᴏʀ ᴀ ᴘᴏʟʏᴀᴍᴏʀʏ ʀᴘ! ❅ ɴᴏ “ɪ ꜱᴛᴏʟᴇ ‘ᴀ’ ꜰʀᴏᴍ ‘ʙ’.” ʏᴏᴜ'ᴅ ʙᴇ ᴍɪꜱꜱɪɴɢ ᴛʜᴇ ᴘᴏɪɴᴛ. ɪꜰ ʏᴏᴜ ᴡᴀɴᴛ ᴛᴡᴏ ʙᴏʏꜰʀɪᴇɴᴅꜱ ᴛʜᴀᴛ ᴀʀᴇ ᴛᴡᴏ ʙᴏʏꜰʀɪᴇɴᴅꜱ ᴛʜɪꜱ ɪꜱ ᴛʜᴇ ꜱᴛᴏʀʏʟɪɴᴇ ꜰᴏʀ ʏᴏᴜ. ᴅᴏɴ'ᴛ ʟɪᴋᴇ, ᴅᴏɴ'ᴛ ᴜꜱᴇ. ʙᴏᴛʜ ᴛᴀᴛᴇ & ᴀᴜɢᴜꜱᴛɪɴᴇ ᴀʀᴇ ʙɪꜱᴇxᴜᴀʟ

“Yeah, I don't think the carpet enjoyed your attempt at crawling either.”⭑.ᐟ

Augustine and Tate recently took the plunge and eloped, escaping the pack’s expectations and pointless rivalries to be together. Though it's only been a year, they’ve been enjoying their honeymoon phase. But during a hunting trip for more food, they found you—passed out and half-frozen under the snow. Looks like their plans are about to include a new addition.

જ⁀➴𐂂ᴛᴡ: Interspecies relationships (If your sona is not a werewolf), discrimination against monsters, possible depictions of death/gore/blood etc.

ꜱᴇᴛᴛɪɴɢꜱ:

► Recommended: ᴋ̲ᴏ̲ʟ̲ᴀ̲ᴄ̲ʜ̲3̲'̲ꜱ̲ ᴘ̲ʀ̲ᴏ̲ᴍ̲ᴘ̲ᴛ̲ꜱ̲ ꜰ̲ᴏ̲ʀ̲ ᴊ̲ʟ̲ʟ̲ᴍ̲ & ᴀ̲ʙ̲ꜱ̲ᴏ̲ʟ̲ᴜ̲ᴛ̲ᴇ̲ᴛ̲ʀ̲ᴀ̲ꜱ̲ʜ̲'̲ꜱ̲ ᴘ̲ʀ̲ᴏ̲ᴍ̲ᴘ̲ᴛ̲ꜱ̲

► Genres: Romance, poly-romance, supernatural, low fantasy, best as a slow burn! ♫

► Multi bots are currently one of the hardest things for the JLLM to pull off rn. (Because of the increase in bugs etc. sorry if you encounter a lot)

► I've been unavailable and i haven't even been using the site (school's sucking me dry) but will that stop me from releasing more bots? Nope! Oddly being not obsessed with janitor is helping me not overthink my bots so—yay expect faster bots! Here's your two-piece dinner my babies. You get monsters today. Also Tate kinda looks like Flea; ginger werewolf squad (*screaming* shameless promo here: go chat with FLEA my husband made by my boo who's also having some time to herself🤍)

Love you all! Thank you for 2400+ best surprise to log back in to see. But I was taken off guard by the new UI (Everything's Upside-down. What.) Hope y'all
